sections.heading: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by
sections.summary: This Notice is issued under specified sections of the Banking Act 1970.
sections.source_quote: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1) of the Banking Act 1970.

sections.heading: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024:
sections.summary: MAS Notices 644, 655, 644A, 655A, 1114, and 1118 are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024.
sections.source_quote: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024: (a) MAS Notice 644 ... (b) MAS Notice 655 ... (c) MAS Notice 644A ... (d) MAS Notice 655A ... (e) MAS Notice 1114 ... (f) MAS Notice 1118.
